name: @soulsys/soulsys-skill
description: Soulsys skill for managing soul state

scripts.generate: cp ../../apps/soul-api/openapi.json openapi.json && openapi-typescript openapi.json -o src/client/generated/api.d.ts && bun scripts/generate-descriptions.ts && biome format --write src/client/generated/
scripts.build: pnpm generate && tsc --noEmit && bun scripts/generate-skill-md.ts && pnpm bundle
